title: Los amantes
writer: José G. Cruz, Fernando A. Rivero
actors: Emilia Guiú, David Silva, Luis Aldás
plot: Yolanda, a cabaret "entertainer" with a shady past tries to escape her exploitive 'manager' Alejandro and turns to Jorge Rubio for help. He helps her leave Ciudad Juarez, evading Alejandro. She ends up in Mexico City where she mar...
